PHOTOCOPY FOR DANRIDGE, QUEEN

C/C & HEARD BEFORE JUDGE OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE IN DEPT. 02 ON 31JUL01 WITH JAMES MILLAR APP. FOR PLNTF. & DREXEL A. BRAD- SHAW APP. FOR DEFDNT; 12 JURORS SWORN FOR JURY TRIAL; VERDIC IN FAVOR OF PLNTF. & AGANST DEF. DIANA L. GRIFFIN; JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF & AGAINST DEFENDANT; PLNTF AWARDED RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 528 LISBON ST, S.F, CA;LEASE OR AGREEMENT IS DECLARED FORFEIT- ED, VOID AND OF NO EFFECT. FURTHER, PLNTF TO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIANA GRIFFIN IN THE WAY OF CLAIMED DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF $36.67 PER DAY COMMENCING FROM MAY 8,2001 TO DATE OF VACATING OF THE PREMISES. ANY AMOUNT OF DAILY RENTAL VALU SHALL BE OFFSET BY A CREDIT TO DEFENDANT FOR ANY HOUSING ASSISTANCE PAYMENTS RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF FROM THE S.F.HOUS- ING AUTHORITY FOR THE SAME TIME PERIOD. PLNTF. TO RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT AND REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES.
